title: Close the transitive/delegated agent-config trust surface
acceptance: a PR that edits ONLY a file referenced by a floored agent-config (e.g. opencode.json instructions:[...] or prompt {file:./path}, CLAUDE.md @import, Cursor rule references) is graded at or above the referencing config's floor, not the default floor
reference targets are resolved deterministically from committed bytes (parse the floored config at the diff head/base), never trusting a scanner or heuristic

fail closed: if a floored config's reference directives cannot be parsed or a referenced path cannot be resolved, the affected paths floor to T3 (or the change blocks), never silently pass at a lower tier
no over-broad flooring: only the actually-referenced paths are added to the floor set, not their whole directories, unless the config references a directory
this is a QRM-4.0 Gate prerequisite: the Gate is not complete tier-floor enforcement while a floor can be bypassed by delegation
